headline: China-US tech truce fragile as military talks underscore rivalry
headline_zh: 中美科技休战脆弱，军事对话凸显竞争
narrative: The fragility of the US-China tech truce is the day's structural story, amplified by military talks in Hawaii where Beijing drew red lines on surveillance. Meanwhile, the European Central Bank's confirmation that gold has surpassed the US dollar as the top global reserve asset signals accelerating de-dollarization, a trend China actively promotes. Domestically, Xi Jinping's cultural speech reinforces ideological consolidation ahead of key anniversaries.
narrative_zh: 中美科技休战的脆弱性是今日的结构性主题，夏威夷军事对话中中方划定侦察红线强化了这一叙事。欧洲央行确认黄金取代美元成为全球第一大储备资产，标志着去美元化加速，中国对此积极推动。国内方面，习近平的文化讲话在重大纪念日前强化了意识形态整合。
market_snapshot: SSE Composite 4097.94 ▲0.99% · Shenzhen Component 15951.075 ▲3.98% · ChiNext 4216.736 ▲3.97% · USD/CNY 6.7668 ▲0.08% · USD/CNH 6.7675 ▲0.11%

top_stories.english_title: Xi calls for assuming new cultural mission on anniversary of symposium
top_stories.why_it_matters: The speech signals a renewed push for ideological conformity and cultural confidence ahead of the 2027 Party Congress.
